{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213204BF5C5BA287453808A5DA"}"},"total":6022},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7524320551497007897","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结撒花！真是感慨，23年开始追更，到今天才看完，作者写的真不错，在无数的冬夜中，我蜷缩在被子里鹅鹅大笑，也是看过的小说中唯一一本让我收获开心最多次的小说，无数言语难以形容现在的心情，多的不说了，祝作者下一本能写的比这一本更好，火爆番茄！
                         ———————2025.7.7"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751897828,"group_id":"7288711878845402166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只学习不玩耍，聪明三月也变傻","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/f5+JFKNo1Ri8WVOoj/S7929KFWXVW2iuT5DElhO6F6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/09dc77710e0f4bc5866891c027cd3daf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623888&x-signature=nktiBGiPPwwyb4aBJrh0QGBoZ5g%3D","user_id":"4446876160494343","user_name":"三月七 "},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4446876160494343","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288711878845402166","book_info":{"abstract":"【腹黑、无节操、搞笑，纯爱战士避雷】

　　江澈穿越成了都市爽文中的反派富二代，并且绑定神级选择系统。 开局正好撞见女主在偷试卷？触发反派选择！

　　【选择一：装作什么都没看见】

　　【选择二：大声呵斥，引来众人围观】

　　【选择三：...】

　　一个变态的大反派就此诞生。为了不被主角干死，他只能干死各路主角们了。

　　江澈：没有人比我更懂变态！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/425066beec603b4b56b348a629ae8e3a","author":"百年树仁","author_id":"","book_id":"7288711878845402166","book_name":"反派：我的系统不正经！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#908090","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7288711951612379667","read_count":"111387","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2212846"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1076","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,腹黑,反派,穿书,校花,开局,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1bca16ec658f663f8383febe5aee3486~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283925&x-signature=1SbzRlDknxxyn%2BQ4NFiUKijA8eE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3843480874394827","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"192"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213204BF5C5BA287453808A5DA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":28,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":180894,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":39682},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7508275031115989822","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"正常反派文。虽然后宫的数量有点夸张，但是没有出现前面的女主被随随便便遗忘的情况，属于是不错的情况。前中期属于有主线的爽文，虽然爽但是不会有枯燥的情况。后期感觉就是纯为了收后宫服务了，导致感觉有些枯燥。后面基本都是跳着看的，主角没生死大敌，也不需要为什么发愁，然后由于后宫太多导致与每个人的互动变少，新加入的塑造设定感觉有点成了收藏品服务。总体来说，作者写的用心，书也没啥大问题。希望新作能更加有趣。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748160845,"group_id":"7288711878845402166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1nHP5+WmuhQ3HAXEZ+qbKU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"420478766547738","user_name":"卢城的江雪舞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"420478766547738","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288711878845402166","book_info":{"abstract":"【腹黑、无节操、搞笑，纯爱战士避雷】
